name: Moz STAT
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Freelancers, Large Enterprises, Mid Size Business, Small Business
description:
What Moz Does?

Moz Stat is a Moz product and offers aKeyword Rank Tracker among its suite of features. With access to mobile rank tracking and an extensive keyword discovery tool, STAT ensures that businesses can optimize their online presence effectively.

‍

Source: Moz Pro

Features

➡️ Monitors keyword rankings daily across global SERPs.

➡️ Tracks unlimited competitor sites and automates insights.

➡️ Provides pinpoint tracking for local and mobile search results.

➡️ Scales from thousands to millions of keywords at competitive rates.

➡️ Offers top-notch, on-call service with training and custom insights.

➡️ Provides easy access to data through a versatile web app and API.

Benefits

⭐️ Make informed decisions with accurate and up-to-date keyword performance data.

⭐️ Stay ahead by understanding competitors' SEO strategies and adapting accordingly.

⭐️ Save time with automated reporting and customizable dashboards.

⭐️ Plan and execute SEO campaigns more effectively with comprehensive insights.

⭐️ Measure the impact of SEO efforts and demonstrate ROI to stakeholders.

⭐️ Suitable for businesses of all sizes, from startups to large enterprises, looking to improve their online visibility.

Pros 

✅ The tools are convenient and easy to use

Cons 

❌ It does not offer a historical view to check domain authority scores and keyword SERP rankings

❌ Rankings are inaccurate often at times

‍

Offers pricing upon contact
